scenario.name: sub_agent_dispatch_failure
scenario.trigger: A planning sub-agent fails to start, crashes, or returns an error.

required_actions.action: Report the failure to the user: which agent, what error.
Assess impact: can other agents in the same phase continue?
Attempt re-dispatch once with the same parameters.
If re-dispatch fails, offer the user alternatives: skip the agent (with risk acknowledgment), try a different approach, or abort the phase.

scenario.name: validation_persistent_failure
scenario.trigger: Validator finds conflicts that persist after 3 re-dispatch cycles.

required_actions.action: Escalate to the user with the specific unresolvable conflict.
Present the conflicting requirements from both documents.
Ask the user to make a decision on which requirement takes priority.
Re-dispatch the affected agent with the user's decision as a constraint.

scenario.name: missing_upstream_artifact
scenario.trigger: An agent needs an upstream artifact that doesn't exist.

required_actions.action: Do not dispatch the agent.
Identify which phase and agent produces the missing artifact.
Dispatch the upstream agent first, or ask the user if the upstream phase should be run.

prohibited_actions.action: Do not dispatch an agent without its required upstream artifacts.

scenario.name: user_wants_to_skip_phase
scenario.trigger: User wants to skip a planning phase.

required_actions.action: Identify which plan artifacts will be missing.
Identify which downstream phases will be affected (missing input).
Present the risks explicitly to the user.
Require explicit acknowledgment before skipping.
Mark skipped artifacts as NOT PLANNED in the validation report.

scenario.name: sync_skill_not_found
scenario.trigger: User wants SaaS sync but no matching skill exists.

required_actions.action: Report which system was requested and that no sync skill exists.
Offer to proceed with internal planning only (plan/ is complete without sync).
Offer to create the missing sync skill using skill-writer mode.

prohibited_actions.action: Do not attempt to sync without a matching skill.
Do not claim sync occurred when it did not.

scenario.name: plan_folder_stale
scenario.trigger: Plan artifacts exist but appear outdated or inconsistent with each other.

required_actions.action: Run the validator on all existing artifacts to identify specific issues.
Present findings to the user.
Recommend which phases need re-running.
Get user agreement before re-dispatching agents.

scenario.name: scope_change_mid_planning
scenario.trigger: User changes requirements or scope after some phases are complete.

required_actions.action: Identify which existing plan artifacts are affected by the change.
Determine the earliest affected phase.
Present the re-planning scope to the user.
Re-run from the earliest affected phase, treating unaffected artifacts as constraints.
Re-validate all artifacts after updates.
